title: Spirit of the Glass 2: The Haunted
original_title: Spirit of the Glass 2: The Haunted
overview: Three fashionista friends who are popular on social media attempt to have some offline fun by trying to contact spirits using the age-old Spirit of the Glass game and this opens up to a series of horrific haunting experiences.
